personal.name: Sri Ganesh Arya Mahendra
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Building secure, scalable enterprise solutions with Spring Boot and microservices
personal.bio: Software Engineer at DBS Tech India with expertise in building secure authentication systems and microservices. Specialized in Java, Spring Boot, and cloud technologies, with a proven track record of delivering high-quality solutions that enhance security and performance. Passionate about writing clean, testable code and collaborating with cross-functional teams.

projects.title: ENDRA (Enterprise Depiction Radar Tool)
projects.description: Built a dashboard for dynamic analysis of systems for Business Managers at DBS Tech by using ReactJS, Java Spring Boot, and MySQL. Used by 50+ teams, with over 400 systems being monitored.

projects.title: Currency Conversion Tool
projects.description: Replicated micro-services architecture by deploying API Gateway, Spring Cloud Config Server and Spring Boot services into GCP using Docker and Kubernetes.

projects.title: Hospital Appointment Chatbot
projects.description: Built a chatbot To schedule hospital appointments based on the requirements using Python Fast API communicating with Gemini 2.5 Pro.

achievements: Integrated and optimized third-party OAuth2 authorization with Spring Boot, enabling frictionless authentication for 50K+ monthly users across partner platforms.
Architected and deployed a secure transaction signing framework using JWT and asymmetric cryptography, eliminating security vulnerabilities and ensuring MAS compliance.
Developed scalable APIs for authorization using JWE tokens and Redis caching, improving session management efficiency and system resilience.
Engineered facial verification authentication in Spring Boot, reducing login latency by 65% (from 800ms to 283ms) and accelerating customer on-boarding.
Developed a FIDO-based authentication for transaction signing, projected to save $20M annually while ensuring robust security for high-volume transactions.
Optimized Kafka–ElasticSearch APIs, reducing event indexing latency by 40% and improving SLA compliance for 10+ teams.
Designed and implemented customer elevation APIs, orchestrating Multi-Factor authentication (1FA, 2FA, 3FA) to enforce adaptive risk-based security controls.
Implemented Username–Password authentication, ensuring secure credential validation, encryption, and session management.
Orchestrated OTP management enabling secure OTP generation, validation, and expiration handling for two-factor authentication (2FA), to prevent replay attacks.
Owned and enhanced the IAM Authorization module, driving improvements in access control, token validation, and role-based authorization policies.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

extra_curricular: Active participation in People of Purpose activities with over 40+ hours clocked every year
Led engagement activities for teams with over 90% participation
